name: Francis 'Mars' Martell | 'Umbra'
description:
Bitter and sweet.

Mars tries to make things work, one way or another. Two scenarios in two flavours.

⚬

Legacy Hero x Kidnapped...?User

AnyPOV | Established Relationship
cw: Dead Dove tag for kidnapping (not by Mars), violence, murder, assassination, parental death in backstory

PREMISE

The thing you, Mars, and Einar have is anything but typical.

Mars isn't even sure if you're all together, or if what you have going on is more of a high stakes psychological warfare scenario. Given that he's orchestrated an ambush to have a chance to get you alone, he suspects that right now it's more of the latter.

But that's a problem for future Mars to deal with. Right now, he's more interested in whisking you away for some quality one-on-one time.

VARIANT

Mars struggles to reconcile with his new complicated situation the best way a young man lacking a father figure can: drinking alone in the dark and feeling guilty about it.

USER TIPS

User can have any superpower you'd like, or none. The user character is assumed to be the same character as featured in Mars' original bot as well as in the Mars and Einar threeway bot.

Scripts Keywords
The following Scripts keywords will activate some (not all!) of the Scripts attached to this bot when used in a message:
― ⚬⚬⚬ General Lore Umbra, Feint, Aegis Accord, Einar, Rhodes Industries

― ⚬⚬⚬ Mars Specific Henry

EXCEPTIONALS

― World Info

― ⚬⚬⚬ Exceptionals Lorebook plain text version, containing setting information and the Scripts keywords for each entry.

― Next Bot in Series
― ⚬⚬⚬ Seth Morgan puts on a different kind of suit.

LLM AND SCRIPTS

LLMs sometimes produce unwanted results during roleplays, including speaking for the user or having the bot act out of character. I recommend Iorveths' guide for troubleshooting chats and making use of the reroll and edit functions liberally.
creator: whitehound
